subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-03 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In the East, the mention of one's own native land has never conduced to the excitement or unification of the Easterners, nor has it ever produced any great results
subcodes.first_line_orig: در شرق ذکر وطن هیچوقت سبب هیجان و اتفاق مشرقیان نشده و منبحْ نتائج عظیمه نگشته
subcodes.subjects: @praise of Eastern values; culture, @nationalism; love of country
